targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(evaluation_batches) FROM analytics.v_calibration_confidence_summary), 0)::bigint AS total_evaluation_batches, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT evidence_label) FROM analytics.v_dispersion_aq_evidence_summary), 0)::bigint AS distinct_dispersion_evidence_labels, (SELECT MIN(match_count) FROM analytics.risk_model_evaluations) AS min_match_count_in_evaluations, CASE WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM analytics.risk_model_evaluations) THEN 'no data / insufficient — no evaluation batches yet (exploratory)' WHEN (SELECT MIN(match_count) FROM analytics.risk_model_evaluations) IS NULL THEN 'no data / insufficient' WHEN (SELECT MIN(match_count) FROM analytics.risk_model_evaluations) < 3 THEN 'insufficient sample — correlation omitted below default threshold (exploratory)' ELSE 'meets default min_match threshold — engineering evidence only (not validation)' END AS minimum_sample_status_wording, 'Sparse or empty calibration panels mean insufficient data — not proof of model quality.' AS interpretation_hint

SELECT centroid_longitude AS longitude, centroid_latitude AS latitude, risk_band::text AS risk_band, geoid::text AS geoid, risk_score, name FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_risk_county_geojson WHERE model_version = 'v2' ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 400;

SELECT centroid_longitude AS longitude, centroid_latitude AS latitude, risk_band::text AS risk_band, geoid::text AS geoid, risk_score, name FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_risk_tract_geojson WHERE model_version = 'v2' ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 600;
SELECT longitude, latitude, detection_id::text AS detection_id, source::text AS source, acq_datetime, frp FROM analytics.v_latest_fire_detections_geojson LIMIT 400;
SELECT longitude, latitude, parameter::text AS parameter, value, unit::text AS unit, measured_at FROM analytics.v_latest_air_quality_geojson LIMIT 400;

SELECT geography_type, geography_name, geoid, risk_score, risk_band, window_end, model_version, risk_rank FROM analytics.v_top_smoke_risk_areas WHERE risk_rank <= 20 ORDER BY model_version, risk_rank;

SELECT geoid, name, risk_score, risk_band, centroid_latitude, centroid_longitude, LEFT(geojson_simplified::text, 120) AS geojson_preview FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_risk_county_geojson WHERE model_version = 'v2' ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50;

SELECT geoid, name, risk_score, risk_band, centroid_latitude, centroid_longitude, LEFT(geojson_simplified::text, 120) AS geojson_preview FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_risk_tract_geojson WHERE model_version = 'v2' ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50;
SELECT source, mode, status, started_at, finished_at, records_fetched, records_published, records_failed, error_message FROM analytics.v_ingestion_run_status LIMIT 50;
SELECT dataset, latest_event_time, latest_row_time FROM analytics.v_source_freshness;
SELECT metric, value FROM analytics.v_data_quality_summary ORDER BY metric;
SELECT alert_event_id, severity, alert_type, title, last_seen_at, runbook_slug FROM analytics.v_open_alert_events ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT notifier, status, attempt_count, last_attempted_at FROM analytics.v_notification_attempt_summary ORDER BY notifier, status;
SELECT attempted_at, notifier, alert_event_id, error_class, LEFT(error_message, 120) AS error_message, retry_after FROM analytics.v_notification_failures ORDER BY attempted_at DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT alert_event_id, notifier, last_status, success_count, failure_count, skipped_count FROM analytics.v_alert_delivery_state ORDER BY alert_event_id DESC LIMIT 80;
SELECT operational_run_id, mode, started_at, finished_at, status, LEFT(error_message, 120) AS error_message FROM analytics.v_recent_operational_cycles ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT wind_observation_id, source, station_id, observed_at, wind_speed_mps, wind_direction_degrees, county_geoid FROM analytics.v_latest_wind_observations ORDER BY observed_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 80;
SELECT longitude, latitude, wind_observation_id::text AS wind_observation_id, wind_speed_mps, wind_direction_degrees FROM analytics.v_latest_wind_observations_geojson LIMIT 200;

SELECT exposure_rank, geography_type, geoid, exposure_score, detection_id, distance_km, angular_error_degrees, window_end, computed_at FROM analytics.v_top_plume_exposures ORDER BY exposure_rank ASC LIMIT 50;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_smoke_transport_summary;

SELECT geography_type, geography_name, geoid, risk_score, risk_band, window_end, LEFT(explanation::text, 200) AS explanation_preview FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_risk_v3 ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 40;
SELECT source_topic, target_dataset, error_class, occurrence_count, last_seen_at, error_message_preview AS error_preview, replay_hint FROM analytics.v_parse_errors_open LIMIT 80;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_parse_error_summary LIMIT 80;
SELECT source_topic, target_dataset, error_class, occurrence_count, last_seen_at, LEFT(error_message::text, 160) AS error_preview FROM analytics.v_parse_errors_recent LIMIT 120;

SELECT consumer_group, topic, partition, current_offset, last_processed_at, age_hours, last_successful_offset, last_error_offset FROM analytics.v_consumer_offset_state ORDER BY topic, partition LIMIT 80;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_dlq_operational_summary;
SELECT topic, partition, low_watermark, high_watermark, depth_observed_at, approx_span_messages FROM analytics.v_kafka_topic_depth ORDER BY topic, partition LIMIT 120;
SELECT consumer_group, topic, partition, current_offset, high_watermark, lag, lag_observed_at FROM analytics.v_consumer_lag_latest ORDER BY lag DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 80;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_dlq_topic_depth;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_pipeline_lag_summary;
SELECT dlq_replay_run_id, source, dry_run, status, started_at, finished_at, records_scanned, records_replayed, records_resolved FROM analytics.v_dlq_replay_runs LIMIT 40;
SELECT run_source, run_dry_run, status, source_topic, target_topic, created_at, error_message_preview FROM analytics.v_dlq_replay_items_recent LIMIT 80;

SELECT weather_cell_id, source, grid_id, valid_time, latitude, longitude, wind_speed_mps, wind_direction_degrees, temperature_c, relative_humidity_percent FROM analytics.v_latest_weather_grid_cells ORDER BY valid_time DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;

SELECT detection_id, weather_cell_id, match_method, distance_km, time_delta_minutes, wind_speed_mps, wind_direction_degrees, matched_at FROM analytics.v_fire_weather_matches ORDER BY matched_at DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_fire_weather_match_summary;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_grid_weather_operational_summary;
SELECT geography_type, geoid, risk_score, risk_band, model_version, computed_at, explanation FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_risk_v4 ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;

SELECT geography_type, geoid, detection_id, exposure_score, distance_km, wind_from_degrees, window_start, window_end, explanation FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_plume_exposures_v2 ORDER BY exposure_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_integration_pipeline_counts;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_fire_weather_unmatched ORDER BY acq_datetime DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;
SELECT geography_type, geoid, risk_score, risk_band, computed_at, explanation FROM analytics.v_latest_risk_v4_explanations ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;
SELECT risk_observation_id, observed_at, geography_type, geoid, observation_type, observed_value, source FROM analytics.risk_observations ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 200;

SELECT risk_model_evaluation_id, model_version, evaluated_at, window_start, window_end, observation_type, match_count, mae, rmse FROM analytics.risk_model_evaluations ORDER BY evaluated_at DESC LIMIT 80;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_risk_calibration_summary;

SELECT geography_type, geoid, detection_id, dispersion_score, distance_km, downwind_distance_km, window_start, window_end FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_dispersion_exposures ORDER BY dispersion_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_top_dispersion_exposures LIMIT 100;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_dispersion_operational_summary;
SELECT geography_type, geoid, lag_bucket, evidence_label, max_dispersion_score, avg_pm25, avg_pm10, aq_observation_count, comparison_score FROM analytics.v_dispersion_aq_comparisons LIMIT 200;
SELECT geography_type, geoid, risk_score, risk_band, computed_at, explanation FROM analytics.v_latest_smoke_risk_v5 ORDER BY risk_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 200;
SELECT dispersion_exposure_id, detection_id, geography_type, geoid, dispersion_score, concentration_proxy, explanation FROM analytics.v_dispersion_model_debug;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_dispersion_aq_evidence_summary ORDER BY comparison_row_count DESC LIMIT 100;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_dispersion_aq_lag_summary ORDER BY lag_bucket LIMIT 50;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_risk_model_evaluation_latest LIMIT 50;
SELECT model_version, evaluated_at, match_count, mae, rmse, correlation, confidence_label, insufficient_data_reason FROM analytics.v_risk_model_evaluation_history LIMIT 100;

SELECT geography_type, geoid, lag_bucket, evidence_label, max_dispersion_score, avg_pm25, aq_observation_count FROM analytics.v_model_overprediction_candidates ORDER BY max_dispersion_score DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100;

SELECT geography_type, geoid, lag_bucket, evidence_label, max_dispersion_score, avg_pm25, aq_observation_count FROM analytics.v_model_underprediction_candidates ORDER BY avg_pm25 DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 100;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_calibration_confidence_summary;
SELECT * FROM analytics.v_risk_observation_coverage ORDER BY observation_rows DESC LIMIT 200;
